company.name_jp: 株式会社第一コンピュータサービス

research_notes: Research date: 2026-06-26. Website https://www.dcs21.co.jp/ accessible. Founded 1976. 460 employees. President: 鮎沢潤. System development solutions. ISO27001, ISO9001:2015, Privacy Mark certified. HQ at Muza Kawasaki Central Tower. Multiple subsidiaries (DCS Holdings, System Works, Data Labo, Hybrid Service). KIA member.
